mano_cua.result_summary: 应用需要Supabase后端服务（VITE_SUPABASE_URL和VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY环境变量），缺少导致React应用抛出supabaseUrl is required错误，完全无法初始化。页面只显示Lokus紫色文字splash screen，编辑器UI不可用，所有功能无法测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Application requires Supabase backend credentials (VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY). Without them, React app throws uncaught error and fails to render any components. Only CSS pseudo-element splash screen is visible.
